# GerminaR

GerminaR is a platform base in open source R package to calculate and
graphic the main germination indices. GerminaR include a web application
called “GerminQuant for R” for interactive analysis.

## Installation

You can install the released version of GerminaR from
[CRAN](https://cran.r-project.org/package=GerminaR) with:

``` r
install.packages("GerminaR")
```

And the development version from
[GitHub](https://github.com/flavjack/GerminaR) with:

``` r
if (!require("remotes"))
  install.packages("remotes")
remotes::install_github("Flavjack/GerminaR")
```

## GerminaQuant app

``` r
GerminaR::GerminaQuant()
```

If is the first time running the app you should install the app
dependencies, including the following argument:

``` r
GerminaR::GerminaQuant(dependencies = TRUE)
```

After install the package and the app dependencies you can access to the
app through the Addins list in Rstudio, or in the following link in the
internet <https://flavjack.shinyapps.io/germinaquant/>

## Citation

Lozano-Isla, Flavio; Benites-Alfaro, Omar Eduardo; Pompelli, Marcelo
Francisco (2019). GerminaR: An R package for germination analysis with
the interactive web application “GerminaQuant for R.” Ecological
Research, 34(2), 339–346. <https://doi.org/10.1111/1440-1703.1275>

# Package index

## All functions

- [`fplot()`](http://germinar.inkaverse.com/reference/fplot.md) : Plot
  line or bar graphic
- [`GerminaQuant()`](http://germinar.inkaverse.com/reference/GerminaQuant.md)
  : GerminaQuant for R
- [`ger_ASG()`](http://germinar.inkaverse.com/reference/ger_ASG.md) :
  ArcSin of Germination Percentage
- [`ger_boxp()`](http://germinar.inkaverse.com/reference/ger_boxp.md) :
  Boxplot graphic
- [`ger_CVG()`](http://germinar.inkaverse.com/reference/ger_CVG.md) :
  Coefficient of Variance of the Mean Germination Time
- [`ger_GRP()`](http://germinar.inkaverse.com/reference/ger_GRP.md) :
  Germination Seed Percentage
- [`ger_GRS()`](http://germinar.inkaverse.com/reference/ger_GRS.md) :
  Germinated Seed Number
- [`ger_GSP()`](http://germinar.inkaverse.com/reference/ger_GSP.md) :
  Germination Speed
- [`ger_intime()`](http://germinar.inkaverse.com/reference/ger_intime.md)
  : Cumulative sum of germination by period of time for line graphic
- [`ger_MGR()`](http://germinar.inkaverse.com/reference/ger_MGR.md) :
  Mean Germination Rate
- [`ger_MGT()`](http://germinar.inkaverse.com/reference/ger_MGT.md) :
  Mean Germination Time
- [`ger_SDG()`](http://germinar.inkaverse.com/reference/ger_SDG.md) :
  Standard deviation of the Mean Germination Time
- [`ger_summary()`](http://germinar.inkaverse.com/reference/ger_summary.md)
  : Summary of Germination indices
- [`ger_SYN()`](http://germinar.inkaverse.com/reference/ger_SYN.md) :
  Germination Synchronization Index
- [`ger_testcomp()`](http://germinar.inkaverse.com/reference/ger_testcomp.md)
  : Multiple comparison test
- [`ger_UNC()`](http://germinar.inkaverse.com/reference/ger_UNC.md) :
  Germination Uncertainty
- [`ger_VGT()`](http://germinar.inkaverse.com/reference/ger_VGT.md) :
  Variance of the Mean Germination Time
- [`gquant_analysis()`](http://germinar.inkaverse.com/reference/gquant_analysis.md)
  : GerminaQuant data analysis
- [`osmp()`](http://germinar.inkaverse.com/reference/osmp.md) : Osmotic
  potential calculator
- [`prosopis`](http://germinar.inkaverse.com/reference/prosopis.md) :
  Germination under different osmotic potentials and temperatures.
- [`rep_row()`](http://germinar.inkaverse.com/reference/rep_row.md) :
  Repeated Rows in a data matrix
- [`textcolor()`](http://germinar.inkaverse.com/reference/textcolor.md)
  : Colourise text for display in the terminal.
- [`webTable()`](http://germinar.inkaverse.com/reference/webTable.md) :
  Web table
